calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2016 Continued To Oct-26-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiffs Notice Of And Request For Prove-Up Hearing For Entry Of Court Judgment Or, Alternatively, Entry Of Court Judgment On The Papers
Off Calendar Sep-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph J. Carson, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Gena Eales, CSR 176.

Christopher Spiers, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Emporium Mall LLC,
No appearance by defaulted defendant Fouth Floor Restaurant LLC,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witness: Anthony Rossi sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $488,777.79
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $2825.00
Costs: $624.25
Total Judgment in the amount of $492,227.04

Judgment signed in open court.

Plaintiffs Notice Of And Request For Prove-Up Hearing For Entry Of Court Judgment Or, Alternatively, Entry Of Court Judgment On The Papers
Off Calendar Aug-11-2016 Continued To Sep-15-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF EMPORIUM MALL LLC'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order is off calendar. The relief sought by this application was granted by ex parte order filed July 1, 2016.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2016 Continued To Sep-21-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
